goal: Close the unfinished A1 branch from v2 to a final PROMOTE/REJECT verdict, and only if A1 fails open exactly one next low-friction candidate through the full acceptance chain.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune its hours, days, thresholds, or execution parameters
Any candidate must pass strict-additive, permissive-integration, ownership, and cannibalization proof before promotion
No medium-friction wave B until both low-friction branches (A1 + one of A2/A3) are fully closed with no promoted candidate
Only one active low-friction branch may be investigated at a time
Maximum 3-4 features per prototype; maximum 2-3 prototypes per branch
If a candidate loses positivity after removing its strongest historical segment, it is not mainline-quality

slices.title: Аудит артефактов v2 и фиксация инвариантов v3
slices.hypothesis: Open a clean v3 research project, record a full v2 postmortem, and fix the invariant and hypothesis-tracking discipline before any new work.
slices.objective: Open a clean v3 research project, record a full v2 postmortem, and fix the invariant and hypothesis-tracking discipline before any new work.
success_criteria: v3 project exists with no reference confusion
Branch closure discipline recorded as invariant
evidence_requirements: v3 project exists with no reference confusion
Branch closure discipline recorded as invariant

slices.title: Полный forensic-review ветки A1
slices.hypothesis: Reconstruct the exact logic, signals, and trade anatomy of A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v2 artefacts before any new testing.
slices.objective: Reconstruct the exact logic, signals, and trade anatomy of A1_high_iv_long_v1 from v2 artefacts before any new testing.
success_criteria: A1 logic is fully reproduced and documented
v2 claimed results are compared against v3 actual results
Signal orthogonality to base is assessed
evidence_requirements: A1 logic is fully reproduced and documented
v2 claimed results are compared against v3 actual results
Signal orthogonality to base is assessed

slices.title: Stability и concentration для A1
slices.hypothesis: Determine whether A1 survives as a genuine specialist layer across time windows and is not driven by a concentrated cluster of trades.
slices.objective: Determine whether A1 survives as a genuine specialist layer across time windows and is not driven by a concentrated cluster of trades.
success_criteria: Honest verdict on whether A1 remains positive across the majority of windows
Concentration check completed: result is not driven by a handful of outlier trades
evidence_requirements: Honest verdict on whether A1 remains positive across the majority of windows
Concentration check completed: result is not driven by a handful of outlier trades
